m	Z	
Transforms for PEP processing.
- `Headers`: Used to transform a PEP's initial RFC-2822 header.  It remains a
  field list, but some entries get processed.
- `Contents`: Auto-inserts a table of contents.
- `PEPZero`: Special processing for PEP 0.
reStructuredText
nodes
utils
	languages)

	DataError)
	Transform
TransformError)
parts
references
miscc
Headersz<
    Process fields in a PEP's initial RFC-2822 header.
    ih

\$RCSfile: (.+),v \$$z
\$[a-zA-Z]+: (.+) \$$c
q0qD|
j#j$|
j#j$|
j%d!
)#Nz
Document tree is empty.r
rfc2822
classeszADocument does not begin with an RFC-2822 header; it is not a PEP.
z?"PEP" header must contain an integer; "%s" is an invalid value.)
Z	base_nodez

z3Document does not contain an RFC-2822 "PEP" header.

    the document after the RFC 2822 header.

TargetNotesz
    Locate the "References" section, insert a placeholder for an external
    target footnote insertion transform at the end, and schedule the
    transform to run immediately.

TargetNotes.applyc
        Remove an empty "References" section.
        Called after the `references.TargetNotes` transform is complete.

    Special processing for PEP 0.
    i
PEPZeroSpecialr
walkZ	startnoder^
visitorrH
PEPZero.applyNrW
    Perform the special processing needed by PEP 0:
    - Mask email addresses.
    - Link PEP numbers in the second column of 4-column tables to the PEPs
      themselves.
    c
unknown_visit
PEPZeroSpecial.unknown_visitc

PEPZeroSpecial.visit_referencec

	visit_row

PEPZeroSpecial.visit_entryN)
peps@python.orgz
python-list@python.orgz
python-dev@python.orgc
    Mask the email address in `ref` and return a replacement node.
    `ref` is returned unchanged if it contains no email address.
    For email addresses such as "user@host", mask the address as "user at
    host" (text) to thwart simple email address harvesters (except for those
    listed in `non_masked_addresses`).  If a PEP number (`pepno`) is given,
    return a reference including a default email subject.
    r
mailto:r
&#32;&#97;t&#32;r
html)
formatz
?subject=PEP%%20%s)
hasattr
startswith
non_masked_addressesr!
replacer
raw)
